description_long: This is a decorative metal cup with a cylindrical shape and a wide, sturdy base. The main body is adorned with intricate embossed patterns, including geometric motifs and a prominent crest or emblem on one side. The cup features a single, thin metal handle attached to the side, allowing for easy gripping. The upper portion is fitted with a transparent cylindrical insert, likely made of glass or plastic, which serves as the drinking vessel. The metal exterior has a dark, almost black finish, giving it an antique or vintage appearance. The overall design suggests it is both functional and ornamental, suitable for serving hot beverages in an urban or domestic setting.
description: A dark, ornate metal cup with a transparent insert and a single handle, featuring embossed decorative patterns and a crest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle attachment and detailed embossed patterns on the metal body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin metal handle and the cylindrical transparent insert.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large crest or emblem as the central decorative feature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle on the right, showing the repeating geometric pattern.
